Episodes.Title: The Three Doctors: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Patrick Troughton, William Hartnell
Episodes.Plot: The 10th Anniversary Serial has three incarnations of the Doctor meeting up to face the evil Omega in a universe of antimatter.

Episodes.Title: The Three Doctors: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Patrick Troughton, William Hartnell
Episodes.Plot: The third Doctor and Jo find themselves on an artificial world inside the black hole while the second Doctor tries to find a way to control the organism.

Episodes.Title: The Three Doctors: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Patrick Troughton, William Hartnell
Episodes.Plot: The Time Lord Omega reveals himself to the third Doctor along with plans for vengeance against his own kind.

Episodes.Title: The Three Doctors: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Patrick Troughton, William Hartnell
Episodes.Plot: Omega reveals the purpose behind bringing the Doctor to his antimatter world, but the Doctor(s) discover a startling fact about Omega that he didn't know himself and eventually strike a bargain.

Episodes.Title: Carnival of Monsters: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Tenniel Evans
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor attempts to test his new dematerialisation circuit by taking Jo to Metebelis Three but instead the TARDIS arrives in the hold of a 1920s cargo ship.

Episodes.Title: Carnival of Monsters: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Tenniel Evans
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo attempt to find a way out of the Scope but, when Vorg attempts to entertain the Minorans, the crew of the Bernice suddenly become a lot more dangerous.

Episodes.Title: Carnival of Monsters: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Tenniel Evans
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo return to the Bernice to try and aid their escape but find themselves pursued by the Drashigs.

Episodes.Title: Carnival of Monsters: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Robert Holmes, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Tenniel Evans
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor escapes from the Scope and joins forces with Vorg to try and save its inhabitants but Kalik is still determined to use the Drashigs to start a rebellion.

Episodes.Title: Frontier in Space: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Vera Fusek
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo discover the Master and the Ogrons are the masterminds behind the Galactic war between the Earth Federation and the Reptilian Draconian Empire. The Master has framed the Doctor and Jo as spies working for the Dra...

Episodes.Title: Frontier in Space: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Vera Fusek
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo are taken to Earth, where both humans and Draconians believe them to be a spy for the other side.

Episodes.Title: Frontier in Space: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is sentenced to life imprisonment at a lunar penal colony while Jo encounters an old enemy.

Episodes.Title: Frontier in Space: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Roger Delgado
Episodes.Plot: The Master rescues the Doctor from the lunar penal colony, aiming to take him and Jo to the Ogrons' planet, and the Doctor's attempt to escape leaves him stranded in space.

Episodes.Title: Frontier in Space: Episode Five
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Katy Manning
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Jo and the Master are taken to Draconia, where the Doctor tries to convince the Draconians of the truth. But then the Ogrons attack.

Episodes.Title: Frontier in Space: Episode Six
Episodes.Writer: Malcolm Hulke, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Roger Delgado, Katy Manning
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Williams and the Draconian Prince head to the Ogrons' planet to find evidence of the Master's actions but the Master tricks Jo into leading them into a trap.

Episodes.Title: Planet of the Daleks: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Horsfall
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS lands on the jungle planet Spiridon, where the Doctor has fallen into a coma. Before collapsing he has requested the Time Lords to pilot the TARDIS, so he and Jo can follow the Daleks to their base. Jo learns the Daleks...

Episodes.Title: Planet of the Daleks: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Horsfall
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is captured by the Daleks, while Jo is rescued by a friendly Spridon named Wester.

Episodes.Title: Planet of the Daleks: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Horsfall
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Codal escape from their cell and meet up with the Thal commandos who are trying to get into the Dalek base.

Episodes.Title: Planet of the Daleks: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Horsfall
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends escape from the Dalek base, prompting the Daleks to devise a plan to wipe them out.

Episodes.Title: Planet of the Daleks: Episode Five
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Horsfall
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends ambush two Daleks as part of their planet to get back into the city but the Daleks are on the verge of unleashing their virus.

Episodes.Title: Planet of the Daleks: Episode Six
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Bernard Horsfall
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends prepare to refreeze the Dalek army but the Dalek Supreme has arrived on the planet determined to destroy them all.

Episodes.Title: The Green Death: Episode One
Episodes.Writer: Robert Sloman, Barry Letts, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: While the Doctor plans a holiday to Metebelis Three, Jo and the Brigadier are intrigued by a mysterious death at a coal mine in Llanfairfach, which is being blamed on local company Global Chemicals.

Episodes.Title: The Green Death: Episode Two
Episodes.Writer: Robert Sloman, Barry Letts, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and the Brigadier attempt to rescue Jo and Bert from the mine but Global Chemicals prove distinctly uncooperative.

Episodes.Title: The Green Death: Episode Three
Episodes.Writer: Robert Sloman, Barry Letts, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Jo manage to escape from the mine with a maggot egg but Stevens is determined to stop them analysing it.

Episodes.Title: The Green Death: Episode Four
Episodes.Writer: Robert Sloman, Barry Letts, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Brigadier calls in a full UNIT force to deal with the giant maggots while the Doctor infiltrates Global Chemicals to find out what is really going on.

Episodes.Title: The Green Death: Episode Five
Episodes.Writer: Robert Sloman, Barry Letts, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor manages to escape from BOSS with help from Yates and discovers Cliff has been infected by a giant maggot.

Episodes.Title: The Green Death: Episode Six
Episodes.Writer: Robert Sloman, Barry Letts, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Jon Pertwee, Katy Manning, Nicholas Courtney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor attempts to destroy the giant maggots and cure Cliff but the real threat is BOSS, who is poised to take over all the world's computers.
